typography.pairing_strategy: Old Money Tech: Classic Serif Head + Sterile Mono/Clean Sans Body
rules: Use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter on all large headings (size > 32px).
DO NOT use Inter or generic sans for headings. Headings must use Cormorant Garamond.
Overlines and small labels MUST be Uppercase + text-xs + tracking-[0.2em].
Body text should use IBM Plex Sans for technical clarity in data tables.
Never use pure #000000 or #808080. All greys must be tinted with warm or green tones.
Primary color (Terracotta #C8553D) is for high-value CTAs and Best Deal badges.
Success color (Deep Moss #2D4A22) is for completed scrapes and total savings indicators.
DO NOT use teal or purple. Follow the forbidden color rules.

visual_enhancers.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The Technical Look) for the main dashboard. 1px borders with border-collapse styling. No shadows for a clean, Swiss brutalist feel.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use Optical Clarity glass (bg-white/85, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px border-white/40) for sticky headers to ensure readability.
visual_enhancers.scraper_terminal: Use Retro-Futurism for the active scraping module to contrast the clean dashboard. Deep black background, monospace font, scanning line overlay.

grids.gap_strategy: Tight (gap-4 or gap-6) utilizing 1px borders to create the Grid Borders technical look

layouts.general: Sidebar navigation with a top header for breadcrumbs and actions.
layouts.container: Max-width container, NO center alignment on text. Left-align dense content.
layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing: p-6 or p-8 for standard cards, p-12 for empty states.

motion.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-[1px]) and border color darkening for cards.
motion.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease), NEVER transition: all.
motion.scraper_animation: Use Framer Motion to animate the 'Tracing Beam' border around the active scraper card.

accessibility.contrast: Maintain minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text.
accessibility.focus: Focus states must have high contrast (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

media.images: Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile. Use text shadows when placing text over images.
media.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react. Duotone weight for marketing areas, regular for data density.

3d_libraries.recommendation: Use framer-motion for UI transitions. 3D is overkill for this specific budget data tool, focus on clean high-density data visualization.

image_urls.description: Fresh organic produce market, use as an accent image or for the empty state background of the shopping list.
Close up of a long grocery receipt. Use for the 'No comparisons yet' state on the Results page.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React app with Tailwind CSS and install required libraries: framer-motion, lucide-react, sonner, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Configure tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (Botanical Precision palette) and fonts (Cormorant Garamond, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono).
Use ONLY .js and .jsx extensions. DO NOT use TypeScript (.tsx/.ts).
Shadcn components must be customized: remove generic border-radii, use the 1px grid border look for a high-end technical feel.
The Scraper component must simulate solving a captcha (via CapSolver) and using Claude Opus 4.5 via UI terminal text logs (Retro-Futurism style within the light UI).
Build the Comparison Table prioritizing readability of prices and clearly highlighting the best deal in Terracotta.
Follow the 'Hybrid Component Strategy': Pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layouts, Shadcn primitives for interactive logic (Forms, Dialogs).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: DO NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). This breaks transforms.
DO NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is banned).
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) but NEVER use completely transparent backgrounds under content.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
NEVER use emoji characters for icons. Use proper icon libraries.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='url-submit-button').
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
Do not use generic SaaS blue. Stick strictly to the defined Botanical Precision palette.
